ai.title: AI Settings
ai.subtitle: Manage the Gemini API key used for Deep Research.

byok.heading: Gemini API Key
byok.description: Deep Research calls Gemini directly with the key you register. Google bills your own Google Cloud account.
byok.delete_confirm_body: You'll need to register a new key before starting another research run.
byok.help_text: You can generate a key in Google AI Studio.

error.wrong_prefix: That doesn't look like a Gemini API key (it should start with AIza).
error.save_failed: Couldn't save the key. Try again in a moment.
error.delete_failed: Couldn't delete the key. Try again in a moment.
error.load_failed: Couldn't load the key status. Try refreshing.
